version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="6x7iY57STHqmeEULQpuA" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-404" dy="-162" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=center;" value="What Belongs in a Slice vs. What Is Shared" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="640" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="slices-area" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Feature Slices (independent, self-contained)" vertex="1"> style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="DB Context / ORM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="130" x="15" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
